---
name: test-plan
description: "Write a targeted test plan across backend, frontend, and e2e. Use when: feature or bug fix needs test coverage."
argument-hint: "Feature or change summary"
---
# Test Plan Workflow

## When to Use
- Feature work that needs coverage
- Bug fixes with regression risk
- Permission or role-sensitive behavior

## Procedure
1. List behavior changes and affected roles.
2. Propose backend unit and API tests.
3. Propose frontend unit and integration tests.
4. Propose e2e flows and negative cases.
5. Call out gaps or high-risk areas.

## Output Format
- Coverage matrix (backend, frontend, e2e)
- Priority cases
- Risks and gaps
